positive: A detailed, stylized geometric illustration featuring a majestic celestial owl perched atop ancient, gnarled roots. The style is highly decorative and mystical, combining elements of Art Deco linework with bioluminescent, stained-glass aesthetic. The composition is centered, with the owl forming a strong, clean silhouette against a deeply saturated cosmic nebula background. Use a color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, metallic gold, and emerald green. Emphasize sharp lines, high contrast, and intricate pattern work that reads well when printed on fabric. Minimal negative space, maximum visual impact. Vector art, engraved details, ornate.
negative: photorealistic, blur, fuzzy, gradient, noise, watermark, signature, text, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, abstract mess, low contrast
